policy: Native Windows screenshots are the visual source of truth. A public row is release-ready only when nativeReferenceStatus is ready; crop presence alone is not sufficient.

rows.reason: Current native crop uses macOS/runtime layout bounds; final source review needs native element bounds or reviewed native crop bounds.

rows.reason: The current Windows reference shows only placeholder/diagnostic context for MediaPlayerElement, not rendered native content.

rows.reason: The current Windows reference shows only placeholder/diagnostic context for WebView2, not rendered native content.

rows.reason: The current Windows reference shows unavailable InkToolbar/InkCanvas text instead of native ink controls.
rows.requiredAction: Fix the Windows fixture/reference environment so InkToolbar and InkCanvas instantiate and render before promotion.
